records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff... Huff...* Is he dead?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is no place for you in this world anymore.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank goodness I wasn't late.

records.m_Talk_ENG: He was just bait. Their objective was to steal Akaitama.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We were all fooled.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Et nous sommes tous tomb959s dans le panneau.
